hero.headline_1: Vietnam Agricultural Exchange with International Markets
hero.subheadline: Promoting trade, directly connecting suppliers and buyers in a security-controlled system.

market_story.title: Market Story
market_story.p1: In recent years, Vietnamese agriculture has continuously grown, with export turnover in 2025 reaching about 70 billion USD and continuing to flourish. Many items such as fruits and vegetables, coffee, and cashew nuts maintain high demand in major markets like the US, EU, and China.
market_story.p2: However, behind those impressive figures, the situation of 'good harvest but low prices', dependence on intermediaries, and lack of stable output still occurs, leading to agricultural products being backlogged or not consumed in time. The main reason is that local producers and businesses have not effectively exploited opportunities from the international market: producers find it difficult to access the market directly, while importing enterprises face risks in quality, transparency, and payment.
market_story.p3: Therefore, the problem is not a lack of demand, but lies in trust and the ability to connect effectively.

solution_intro.desc: A specialized B2B agricultural E-commerce platform for Vietnamese agriculture, where sellers and buyers can connect directly without depending on traditional intermediary chains.

app.floating_cta: Contact to explore the model now

features.desc_3: to protect the interests of members.
features.f1_desc: 100% of businesses are verified for legal status and capacity before joining.
features.f2_desc: Funds are held in system and only released when buyer confirms receipt of goods.
features.f5_desc: Reviews are only recorded after transaction completion, linked to actual order history.

process.title: Closed and Transparent Process
process.step_1_desc: Suppliers are checked for legal status, capacity, and product standardization
process.step_2_desc: Buyers search or send requests directly to suitable suppliers
process.step_3_desc: Transactions are established with an intermediary payment mechanism to ensure both parties
process.step_4_desc: The entire shipping process and documents are updated in real-time
process.step_5_desc: Payment is only released when the transaction is completed

commitment.title: Commitment to Accompany
commitment.f1_desc: Team of experts supporting gardens to standardize digital data.
commitment.f2_desc: Guiding businesses to adjust products according to international 'ready-to-use' trends.
commitment.partner_quote: We don't just build a platform, we build a sustainable ecosystem for Vietnamese agriculture.

footer.partner_label: Can Tho Institute of Science and Technology
